---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement to the repository or an existing skill
title: "[FEAT] short description"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the gap or pain point clearly.

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like to see added or changed.

## Affected Area

- [ ] Existing skill (which one? `skills/...`)
- [ ] Repository tooling / CI
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Skill template
- [ ] Other

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, links, or examples here.
